title: Evangelion Jo Rebuild game PS2 and PSP
display_title: Evangelion Jo Rebuild game PS2 and PSP
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion: Jo Rebuild game (PS2 & PSP) [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Lleonard Pler » Wed Apr 01, 2009 4:35 am Famitsu magazine has confirmed a new Evangelion videogame, this time based on Rebuild movies. The title is "Evangelion: Prologue" and the release date for PS2 & PSP versions is June 4th 2009 (only in Japan, obviously). Despite the title, it seems to cover more than the first movie, as you can see EVA-02, Israfel and even Kaworu talking to Shinji...

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed Apr 01, 2009 5:52 am I hope it's going to be a bit like Evangelions 2, with some interesting scenario ramifications.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 01, 2009 9:17 am Holy shit! I'm glad this isn't an April Fool... This looks similar to Eva2. If Asuka's there I wonder if Mari is... I'm gonna order this for PSP.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Apr 01, 2009 9:28 am Great news but I wish these games would come to the USA, but it looks like I have to import the game like I did with Jump Superstars and Ultimate Ninja 3. I was hoping for a PS3 and Xbox360 game though. It might get a Wii port though.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 01, 2009 9:41 am Another sauce: www.psphyper.com

[]:             Quote Post by Lleonard Pler » Wed Apr 01, 2009 10:46 am From what I understand from the blurry scan, it will mix the plot of Evangelion 1.0 and that of the original TV Series. I don't know if this will work as two (or more) different, separate scenarios (kind of Evangelion 2: Another Cases system) or... a rather strange output. Ramiel is depicted in his Evangelion 1.0 form and Asuka mentioned as Shinikami Asuka Langley, that's for sure.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 01, 2009 10:50 am I'm still really excited about this!

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Wed Apr 01, 2009 11:46 am Guyver Spawn wrote: I was hoping for a PS3 and Xbox360 game though. It might get a Wii port though.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Apr 01, 2009 4:48 pm I bet the gameplay sucks even worse than the graphics.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 01, 2009 4:51 pm I dunno, Eva2 had pretty good graphics and gameplay. Also: http://www.evageeks.org/2009/04/new-eva-game-based-on-rebuild/

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Apr 01, 2009 6:24 pm only. If I remember right, Sony has a some connection to Bandai/Namco, so that wouldn't be too surprising

[]:             Quote Post by LIGHTFIRELT » Thu Apr 02, 2009 11:33 pm Too bad these games won't come to American shores.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Apr 02, 2009 11:45 pm I find it really amusing that they're still making PS2 games. Apparently the PS2 is still selling better than the PS3. Poor Sony.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Apr 03, 2009 5:13 am Since FUNI is dubbing RoE, is there a chance that this game might get dubbed?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Apr 03, 2009 6:09 am Little to none. And by little, I mean it approaches zero. Funimation doesn't distribute games.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Apr 03, 2009 6:14 am ^- I'm not talking about distribution though. I'm talking about dubbing. They've dubbed games before and it's been licensed and/or distributed by companies like Atari for example. EDIT: Correct me if I am wrong please. (Not being sarcastic.)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Apr 03, 2009 6:31 am You can't compare the popularity of DBZ or One Piece to Evangelion. Seeing as how the track record for Eva games brought to the states is 0, there's little hope this one would.

[]:             Quote Post by Lleonard Pler » Fri Apr 03, 2009 8:12 am The official site of this game: http://b.bngi-channel.jp/eva_jo/ The graphics look really cool, much better and more detailed than Evangelion 2. Apparently, the combats now are in full 3D. From what I understand, there will be (at least) two scenarios in the game, one covering the whole TV series story and one based on Evangelion 1.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Ingraman » Fri Apr 03, 2009 11:27 am It seems they mixed old and new designs...Eva-02 for example is the usual one, not the rebuild design. Not sure about the graphics...i fear they gave priority to the PSP version. BTW, Asuka is still Soryu or Shikinami?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Apr 03, 2009 12:17 pm ^ If it's based on RoE it's Shikinami.
